ddls:
CREATE TABLE "associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "association_name" TEXT /* Name of the association */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the association */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for the association contact */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the association contact */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the association is active */,
  "membership_cap" INTEGER /* Maximum number of members allowed in the association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the member */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the member */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the member */,
  "membership_status" TEXT /* Status of the member (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language for communications */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "member_associations" (
  "member_association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member-association relationship */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member */,
  "association_id" INTEGER /* ID of the association */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the member joined the association */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the member left the association */,
  "membership_status" TEXT /* Status of the member within the association (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_member_associations_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_member_associations_association_id FOREIGN KEY ("association_id") REFERENCES associations ("association_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee */,
  "association_id" INTEGER /* ID of the association */,
  "fee_type" TEXT /* Type of fee (e.g., Initiation, Dues) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the fee */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the fee becomes effective */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the fee expires */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the fee (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fees_association_id FOREIGN KEY ("association_id") REFERENCES associations ("association_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monthly_fees" (
  "monthly_fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monthly fee record */,
  "member_association_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member-association relationship */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the fee */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the fee */,
  "initiation_fee" REAL /* Initiation fee amount for the month */,
  "dues" REAL /* Dues amount for the month */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount for the month */,
  "payment_due_date" TEXT /* Date the payment is due */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Paid, Pending, Overdue) */,
  "late_fee" REAL /* Late fee amount if the payment is overdue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("monthly_fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_fees_member_association_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_association_id") REFERENCES member_associations ("member_association_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "member_association_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member-association relationship */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Paid, Pending, Failed) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID for the payment */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment */,
  "payment_note" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_member_association_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_association_id") REFERENCES member_associations ("member_association_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_details" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "monthly_fee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monthly fee record */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was generated */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the invoice */,
  "amount_due" REAL /* Amount due for the invoice */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice (e.g., Open, Paid, Overdue) */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Unique invoice number */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms (e.g., net 30, net 60) */,
  "late_fee" REAL /* Late fee amount if the invoice is overdue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_details_monthly_fee_id FOREIGN KEY ("monthly_fee_id") REFERENCES monthly_fees ("monthly_fee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, member, financial officer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "last_password_change_date" TEXT /* Date of the last password change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* Device and browser used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the action occurred */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
